query:
SELECT id, product_name, booking_date, people, amount_total, amount_paid, status, customer_name, channel, created_at, paid_at, quote_id
FROM reservations WHERE customer_name LIKE '%Rata%' OR customer_email = 'jgrande@skicenter.es';
